Sony A7 IV Review - Specifications

William Brawley Editor
View all articles
By William Brawley
Last updated 10/21/2021
  • Overview
  • Samples
    • Thumbnails
  • Gallery
  • Specifications
  • Prices
Imaging-Resources is reader-supported. When you buy through links on our site, we may earn an affiliate commission. Read More

Links

  • Model Name: Sony Alpha ILCE-A7 IV
  • Manufacturer URL: Manufacturer website
  • Predecessor: Sony A7 III

Auto Focus

  • Auto Focus: Yes
  • Auto Focus Type: Fast Hybrid 4D AF: 759 points (PDAF), 425 points (contrast-detection AF); Wide (759 points (PDAF), 425 points (CDAF))/Zone/Center/Flexible Spot (S/M/L)/Expanded Flexible Spot/Tracking (Wide/Zone/Center/Flexible Spot (S/M/L)/Expanded Flexible Spot); Touch AF
  • Auto Focus Assist Light?: Yes
  • Manual Focus: Yes

Power

  • Battery Form Factor: Proprietary
  • Usable Battery Types: NP-FZ100 Lithium-ion rechargeable
  • Batteries Included: 1 x Proprietary NP-FZ100 Lithium-ion rechargeable
  • Battery Charger Included (dedicated charger or AC/USB adapter): Yes
  • Dedicated Battery Charger Included: Yes
  • Internal Charging Supported: Yes

Lens & Optics

  • Digital Zoom Values: Up to 4x; 2x Clear Image Digital Zoom
  • Lens Mount: Sony E
  • Lens: Sony FE 28-70mm f/3.5-5.6 OSS SEL2870
  • Focal Length (35mm equivalent): 28 - 70mm
  • Focal Length (actual): 28 - 70mm
  • Zoom Ratio: 2.50x
  • Aperture Range: f/3.5-22 (W) / f/5.6-36 (T)
  • Integrated ND Filter: No
  • Normal Focus Range: 40 cm to Infinity 15.7 in to Infinity
  • Filter Thread: 55.0mm
  • Thread Type: n/a
  • Optical Image Stabilization: No
  • Digital Zoom: Yes

Image Sensor

  • On-Sensor Phase Detect: No
  • Sensor Type: CMOS
  • Sensor Manufacturer: Sony
  • Effective Megapixels: 33.0
  • Sensor Format: 35mm
  • Approximate Pixel Pitch: 5.12 microns
  • Focal Length Multiplier: 1.0x
  • Aspect Ratio: 3:2
  • Color Filter Type: RGBG
  • Anti Aliasing Filter: None
  • Self-Cleaning: Yes
  • Sensor shift image stabilization: Yes

Image Storage

  • Usable Memory Types: MS PRO Duo / SD / SDHC / SDXC / CFexpress
  • UHS Support: UHS-I
  • Other Memory: 2x:CFexpress Type A, SD UHS-II
  • Dual Card Slots: Yes
  • RAW Capture Support: Yes
  • Uncompressed Format: RAW (14-bit ARW 2.3), RAW+JPEG, RAW+HEIF
  • Included Memory: No memory included

Image Capture

  • Image Resolution: 7008 x 4672 (32.7 MP, 3:2), 4608 x 3072 (14.2 MP, 3:2), 3504 x 2336 (8.2 MP, 3:2), 7008 x 3944 (27.6 MP, 16:9), 4608 x 2592 (11.9 MP, 16:9), 3504 x 1968 (6.9 MP, 16:9), 6224 x 4672 (29.1 MP, 4:3), 4096 x 3072 (12.6 MP, 4:3), 3120 x 2336 (7.3 MP, Other), 4672 x 4672 (21.8 MP, 1:1), 3072 x 3072 (9.4 MP, 1:1), 2336 x 2336 (5.5 MP, 1:1)
  • Image File Format: JPEG (8-bit), HEIF (10-bit), RAW (14-bit ARW 2.3), RAW+JPEG, RAW+HEIF
  • Continuous-mode frames/second: 10.0

General

  • Size: 5.2 x 3.8 x 3.1 in. (131 x 96 x 80 mm)
  • Waterproof: No
  • Waterproof Depth: n/a
  • Model Number: A7 IV
  • Alternate Model Number(s): ILCE-7M4
  • Camera Format: Compact System Camera
  • Currently Manufactured: Yes
  • Retail Price: Compare Prices
  • Retail Price: $2500.00
  • Street Price: $2,598.00
  • Date Available: 2021-12-31
  • Tripod Mount: Yes

Viewfinder

  • Viewfinder: EVF / LCD
  • Viewfinder Type: EVF: 1.3 cm (0.5 type) 3.68M-dot UXGA color OLED, 100% coverage, 0.78x magnification, -4.0 to +3.0 diopter, 23mm eyepoint from the eyepiece lens
  • Focus Peaking: Yes
  • EVF Resolution: 3,686,400 dots (1,228,800 pixels)

Exposure

  • Exposure Compensation: +/- 5.0EV in 0.3EV steps
  • Metering Modes: 1200-zone Evaluative Multi-segment, Center-weighted, Spot (Standard/Large), Entire Screen Avg., Highlight
  • Program Auto Exposure: Yes
  • Aperture Priority: Yes
  • Shutter Priority: Yes
  • Full Manual Exposure: Yes
  • Creative Exposure Modes: 3 Custom Settings; Creative Look; Slow & Quick Motion; HDR: Auto Exposure Difference, Exposure difference Level (1-6 EV at 1.0 EV step)
  • Self Timer: 2, 5, 10; 3/5 shots after 2/5/10 seconds
  • Maximum ISO (native): 51200
  • High Resolution Composite: No
  • Minimum ISO (native): 100
  • ISO Settings: Auto, 100 - 51200, expandable to 50 - 204800
  • Auto ISO Mode: Yes
  • White Balance Settings: Auto, Daylight, Shade, Cloudy, Incandescent, Fluorescent (4 settings), Flash, Custom, Color Temp./ Filter (2500-9900K with 57-step Magenta/Green and 29-step Amber/Blue compensation), Underwater
  • Shutter Speed Range: 1/8000 - 30 sec
  • Bulb Mode: Yes

Video Capture

  • HD Video Out: Yes
  • HD Video Connection: HDMI
  • Can take movies: Yes
  • Movie Resolution: 3840x2160 (60p/â€‹50p/â€‹30p/â€‹25p/â€‹24p) 1920x1080 (120p/â€‹60p/â€‹50p/â€‹30p/â€‹25p/â€‹24p)
  • Movie File Format: XAVC S (Long GOP, H.264 MP4); XAVC HS (Long GOP, H.265 HEVC); XAVC S-I (All-Intra, H.264 MP4)
  • Movie File Format: XAVC S (Long GOP, H.264 MP4); XAVC HS (Long GOP, H.265 HEVC); XAVC S-I (All-Intra, H.264 MP4)
  • Composite Video Out: No
  • NTSC/PAL Switchable Video: n/a
  • Video Usable as Viewfinder: n/a

Flash

  • Flash Exposure Compensation: +/- 3.0 EV in 0.3EV steps
  • External Flash Connection: Enhanced Multi Interface Hot Shoe, Sync Terminal
  • Built-In Wireless Flash Control: No
  • Built-in Flash: No
  • Flash Modes: Auto, Fill Flash, Hi-Speed Sync, Off, Rear Sync, Red-Eye Reduction, Slow Sync
  • Flash Guide Number (ISO 100): n/a
  • Flash Range Description: n/a
  • Max Flash Sync: 1/250

Performance Timing

  • JPEG shooting speed in burst mode (fps, max resolution): 10.0
  • Buffer size for JPEG shooting in burst mode (frames, max resolution): 828

Software

  • Included Software: Capture One Express (for Sony) free download
  • OS Compatibility: Windows, Mac OS X

Display

  • Rear Display Size (inches): 3.0
  • Rear Display Resolution: 3,680,000 dots
  • Touchscreen: Yes
  • Articulating Screen: Yes
  • Tilt Swivel Screen: Yes
  • Selfie Screen: Yes
  • Max Playback Zoom: 13.3x
  • Top Deck Display: No
  • Eye-level Viewfinder: Yes
  • Rear Display: Yes

Connectivity

  • Bluetooth: Yes
  • Built-In GPS: No
  • Microphone Jack: Yes
  • Headphone Jack: Yes
  • External Connections: USB 2.0 High Speed,USB 3.0 Super Speed,Bluetooth,WiFi
  • PictBridge Compliant: No
  • DPOF Compliant: Yes
  • Remote Control: Yes
  • Remote Control Type: Yes, via USB or Wi-Fi
  • Connections (extended): USB-C (USB 3.2 Gen2, 10Gbps), Multi-Terminal Micro USB (with remote support), Type-A HDMI, 3.5mm Microphone and Headphone jacks
  • Built-In Wi-Fi: Yes
  • NFC: Yes

Basic

  • Sensor size: 858.01mm2 (35.90mm x 23.90mm)
  • Weight: 23.2 oz (658 g) includes batteries
